notes: Standard GR always violates WEC. Baseline for comparison.
KK correction makes G_00 slightly LESS negative but never positive. Slope negative.
f(R) correction is mixed sign and can make things WORSE. Not a viable loophole.
FLIPS WEC positive at s0>=5. Torsion adds positive energy. Winner for closest approach.
Weyl projection reduces violation. Flips positive at C_W<=-200 (extreme tuning).
